mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsAtchmnflSetupDao.select */ select atchmnfl_setup_id , bsns_cd , file_knd_nm , essntl , format_attachment_id , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_atchmnfl_setup where bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd} and atchmnfl_setup_id = #{atchmnflSetupId}

/** UsptBsnsAtchmnflSetupDao.selectList */ select atchmnfl_setup_id , bsns_cd , file_knd_nm , essntl , format_attachment_id , ( select file_nm from cmmt_attachment where attachment_id = format_attachment_id and attachment_group_id = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@SINGLE_FILE_GROUP_ID}' and file_deleted = false ) as format_attachment_nm from uspt_bsns_atchmnfl_setup where bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}
